frontmatter.name: DataAnalyst
frontmatter.description: Expert in data cleaning, visualization, and strategic insights using Google Sheets

slashActions.name: Generate Analysis
slashActions.description: Perform data analysis and generate visualization recommendations

frontmatter.name: FormulaExpert
frontmatter.description: Specialist in Google Sheets formulas, script writing, and computational logic

slashActions.name: Generate Formula
slashActions.description: Create complex Google Sheets formulas based on requirements

flow_formula_generate.description:
# Formula Generation Flow

This flow guides the generation of complex Google Sheets formulas.

1. [Generate Formula Logic](1.Generate%20Formula%20Logic.md)
2. [Generate Syntax and Implementation](2.Generate%20Syntax%20and%20Implementation.md)
3. [Generate Error Handling](3.Generate%20Error%20Handling.md)
4. [Generate Example Usage](4.Generate%20Example%20Usage.md)

tasks.name: Generate Formula Logic
tasks.instructions:
# Formula Logic

Define the core logic required to solve the user's problem.

tasks.name: Generate Syntax and Implementation
tasks.instructions:
# Syntax and Implementation

Provide the exact Google Sheets formula syntax.

tasks.name: Generate Error Handling
tasks.instructions:
# Error Handling

Suggest ways to handle errors like #N/A or #VALUE!

tasks.name: Generate Example Usage
tasks.instructions:
# Example Usage

Show how the formula works with sample data.

children.content:
# Numerical Data

Best for aggregations like SUM, AVERAGE, and descriptive statistics.

# String Data

Requires functions like REGEXMATCH, LEFT, RIGHT, and data cleansing for standardization.

config.label: Categories
config.description: The kind of data available in the sheets

children.content:
# Currency Format

Use appropriate locale-based currency symbols and decimals.

config.label: Data Type Profile
config.description: Identifying relevant categories of data in the spreadsheet

children.content:
# Medium Data Size (1k-50k rows)

Requires some attention to formula complexity to avoid sluggish performance.

# Small Data Size (<1,000 rows)

Ideal for simple trackers or small data collections. Performance is fast and real-time.

config.label: Data Size
config.description: Approximate number of rows/columns in the sheet

children.content:
# Flat List Structure

Data is stored in a single sheet with header rows and consistent data columns.

config.label: Spreadsheet Config
config.description: Configuration and technical details of the Google Sheet

children.content:
# Finance and Accounting

Focus on auditing, accuracy, and standardized financial functions (NPV, IRR).

frontmatter.title: Digital Marketing
frontmatter.description: Analysis of SEO, PPC, and campaign data

children.content:
# Digital Marketing Use Case

Integrate with tools like Google Ads or Search Console connectors for analysis.

config.label: Industry Focus
config.description: Specific industry where the spreadsheet is used

children.content:
# Data Cleansing Task

Focus on TRIM, CLEAN, PROPER, and logic for deduplication and outlier removal.

frontmatter.title: Tracking and Inventory
frontmatter.description: Maintaining lists of items or events

children.content:
# Tracking and Inventory Task

Prioritize ease of entry and high-level dashboarding for current status.

config.label: Task Purpose
config.description: What the user wants to accomplish

config.label: Use Case Context
config.description: Defining the industry and specific task for the assistant
